top_categories.workout_context: 194 miles. Your legs will beg to quit after 120. This trains the power output you need from mile 130 onward.
16,568ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Mallorca 312 OK Mobility's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before April.
Mallorca 312 OK Mobility's paved mountain and coastal roads forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 194 miles.
At Mallorca 312 OK Mobility, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
85ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
16,568ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 194 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 16,568ft of climbing on paved mountain and coastal roads does to your power file on race day.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved mountain and coastal roads. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Mallorca 312 OK Mobility. Train it until it feels boring.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Mallorca 312 OK Mobility, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.

race_overlay.nutrition: Ultra-distance fueling for 194 miles: 80–100g carbs/hour from mile 1 — don’t wait until you’re hungry. Practice your exact race-day nutrition in every long training ride. Carry backup calories. 194 miles burns 8,000–12,000+ calories — you cannot replace them all, but you must try.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Mallorca 312 OK Mobility. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Mallorca 312 OK Mobility requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on paved mountain and coastal roads to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, VO2max, and Race Simulation to prepare you for 194 miles of paved mountain and coastal roads in Playa de Muro, Mallorca, Spain.
